title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Haribhakti & Co - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Haribhakti & Co - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Haribhakti & Co are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haribhakti & Co:
Haribhakti & Co is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
